title: Gaant Chart Export Quality
excerpt:
I am glad to see that gaant export to PDF is now released. 
One thing I noticed is that the gaant chart exported is low quality. Is there a way to export in higher quality so we can enjoy the the gaant chart in its full …

posts.author: jason_papav (Jason Papavasileiou)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am glad to see that gaant export to PDF is now released.

One thing I noticed is that the gaant chart exported is low quality. Is there a way to export in higher quality so we can enjoy the the gaant chart in its full glory?

Thank you

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We appreciate your feedback Jason! At this time, it isn’t currently possible to adjust the quality of the export. That said, we have shared this with our internal team who will consider your comments as they continue to make improvements to the feature. Thank you again
